name: Memorial Vault of Gorm Rudglen
inscription: Gorm Rudglen is recorded among the dead of Marara.

name: Sepulcher of Uma Valreach
inscription: Uma Valreach's name was set down for those who came after.

name: Crypt of Dell Rudwood
inscription: Dell Rudwood's kin kept this memory.

name: Sepulcher of Ulf Ingmarsh
inscription: Ulf Ingmarsh is recorded among the dead of Marara.

name: Crypt of Hale Ulmara
inscription: Remember Hale Ulmara of Marara.

name: Tomb of Talan Sardale the 7th
inscription: Talan Sardale the 7th is recorded among the dead of Peldun.

name: Sepulcher of Lark Dorwick the 3rd
inscription: Lark Dorwick the 3rd's name was set down for those who came after.

name: Tomb of Jessa Belshore the 4th
inscription: Jessa Belshore the 4th's name was set down for those who came after.

name: Memorial Vault of Quin Rudglen
inscription: Quin Rudglen is recorded among the dead of Peldun.

name: Sepulcher of Lorn Quilwold
inscription: Lorn Quilwold's name was set down for those who came after.
